creator: erik@nordstroem.no
text:
Created attachment 173457
Poudriere log for pypy.

Poudriere build of lang/pypy failed during packaging stage. Log attached.

I believe that this is due to typos in pkg-plist.

I will attach a patch which I believe will fix this, but the patch needs to be tested first before I know. I am going to test it after the current Poudriere bulk I am running is done. It will take several hours until that happens and then another several hours until that is done. The time for the failed build of lang/pypy alone was 6 hours, 42 minutes and 43 seconds on my computer.

If anyone else is able to test my patch before that, then that would be great but otherwise I will report back when I know if it works.
